details.description: Fixed false-positive conflict detection in ContextPacketL1 assembly
changes: Renamed claims.owned → claims.claimed in ContextPacketL1 interface
Split ownedFiles into claimedFiles (Coordination.getSessionReservations authority) and recentFilePaths (event-derived informational)
Replaced ownedFiles.filter(f => dirtyFiles.includes(f)) with cross-session conflict detection via Coordination.checkPathReserved per dirty file
Updated agentEdits/externalEdits to use claimedFiles for authority-based classification
details.typecheck: 3 pre-existing errors (EventName comparisons at lines 259,261,262), 0 new errors from this change
